title: Ironing Board Covers 140x50cm, Large Ironing Board Cover with 100% Cotton Top and Thick Padding, Easy Fit and Scorch Resistant (Grey Floral, L)
features: 💐EASY TO FIT: LEEWEITAS extra large ironing board covers are designed to fit most ironing boards with a width of 30-40cm and a length of 110-135cm. Cover measures – 140x50cm. Please note you are purchasing cover, the iron board is not included.

💐HIGH-SPEED IRON: Super thick breathable cotton padding of our ironing board cover provides perfect resistance to iron smoothly without letting the clothes slip. Heat reflection feature ensures smooth ironing, maximum efficiency, and minimal electricity costs.

💐PREMIUM MATERIAL&SAFETY: Our heavy duty ironing board cover is finished with 100% cotton top and a thick polyester lining, which means no seperate felt underlayments are required, the ironing board padded cover surface can withstand high temperatures.

💐UNIQUE DESIGN: Our ironing board covers are specially designed with elastic band, hook and loop fastener to apply to more sizes of ironing boards. You can manually adjust the size of the ironing board cover through elastic band, hook and loop fastener to make the ironing board cover more stable.

💐CARE INSTRUCTION: This ironing board cover is easy to clean and it is machine washable and reusable. We recommend wash and leave it outside on the clothesline to dry. Please stick the hook and loop fastener before washing to avoid the hook and loop fastener sticking to the lining.
description: Product Description LEEWEITAS Cotton Ironing Board Cover LEEWEITAS thick iron board cover is finished with high quality material and adjustable design which ensures relaxed, straight forward ironing with the best results in next to no time. Premium Material Sturdy & Durable Elegant Design Machine Washable Super Thick Effortlessly Smooth Ironing Our large iron board cover can provide you with a effortlessly smooth ironing. The heat is perfectly reflected thanks to the special padding with functional layers and clothes are smoothed on both sides simultaneously. The iron glides effortlessly through the thick padding over the ironing board - saving time and energy and protecting textiles. Heavy Duty & Thick Padding Our iron board cover is made with super thick breathable cotton padding, that will hold and reflect the heat while cutting down your ironing time and making your overall experience easy and smooth. You'll be able to save your valuable time and do more things you enjoy. Premium Material The surface of the ironing cover is finished with 100% pure cotton extra thick fabric which makes the cover much more resistant to high temperatures. Adjustable Design Our ironing board covers all have a drawstring or bungee elastic cord that allow you to fit the cover on all shapes of ironing board easily. Tensioning Device It is designed with 3 tensioning device to ensure the cover will not fall off. Durable stitch This thick ironing board cover is finished with sturdy and durable stitch to lasting for a long time. Easy to Install The ironing cover can be easily installed within seconds. Elasticated edging for a quick secure fit, thanks to its strong elastic drawstring cord. It will stay very tight without moving on your board. You can fully focus on your clothes! Reusable & Easy to Clean Our ironing board covers extra large is machine washable. We recommend wash and leave it outside on the clothesline to dry. Please stick the hook and loop fastener before washing to avoid the hook and loop fastener sticking to the thick polyester lining.
